name: Psiics, Moonlight of the Ghoti
name_jp: ゴーティスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>月</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>夜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>サイクス
name_jp_tl: Psiics, Moonlit Night of the Ghotis
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Fish monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Psiics, Moonlight of the Ghoti", then banish 1 Fish monster from your hand or face-up field. If this card is banished: You can banish 1 Fish monster from your hand, GY, or face-up field, except "Psiics, Moonlight of the Ghoti"; Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Psiics, Moonlight of the Ghoti" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Fish monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Psiics, Moonlight of the Ghoti", then banish 1 Fish monster from your hand or face-up field. If this card is banished: You can banish 1 Fish monster from your hand, GY, or face-up field, except "Psiics, Moonlight of the Ghoti"; Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Psiics, Moonlight of the Ghoti" once per turn.
